    PINBALL

    All Games Set to Free Play

    PINBALL

    The Lord of the Rings

    2003 Stern DMD designed by George Gomez/Keith P. Johnson/Chris Granner. 2 Flippers, 3 Ramps, 3 Pop bumpers, One ring to rule them all. Second best pinball game ever made.

    Target Pool

    1969 Gottlieb EM Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 1 Pop bumper, 27 Standup targets.

    Metallica (Pro)

    2013 Stern DMD Design by John Borg. 2 Flippers 2 Ramps In-Line Drops.

    KISS (Pro)

    2015 Stern DMD designed by John Borg. 2 Flippers, 2 Ramps, 4 Pop bumpers, Spinning Disk.

    PIN·BOT

    1986 Williams Solid State Design by Barry Oursler and Python Anghelo. 2 Flippers, 5-target dropping bank, 3 Kick-out holes 2 Ball multiball.

    Doodle Bug

    1971 Williams EM Design by Norm Clark. 2 Flippers, 5 Pop bumpers, 5 Standup targets Doodle Bug Scoring.

    World Cup Soccer

    1994 Williams DMD Design by John Popadiuk, Larry DeMar. 2 Flippers, 2 Ramps, Spinning soccer ball, Goalie target.

    Grand Prix

    1976 Williams EM Design by Steve Kordek. 2 Flippers, 2 Spinners, 2 Pop bumpers.

    Last Action Hero

    1993 Data East Solid State Design by Tim Seckel, Joe Kaminkow, Ed Cebula, John Borg. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 1 Ramp, 6 Ball multiball.

    World Poker Tour

    2006 Stern DMD designed by Steve Ritchie and Keith P. Johnson. 4 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 16 Drop Targets, Ace Hole.

    NBA Fastbreak

    1997 Bally DMD Design by George Gomez. 3 Flippers including 1 Backbox flipper, 3 Ramps, 4 Up kickers.

    Charlie's Angels

    1978 Gottlieb Solid State Design by Allen Edwall. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 8 Drop targets.

    Hokus Pokus

    1976 Bally EM Design by Greg Kmiec. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 3 Stand-up targets, 3 Spinners.

    NASCAR

    2005 Stern DMD designed by Pat Lawlor. 2 Flippers, 2 Ramps, 3 Pop bumpers, Stern Motor Speedway.

    Johnny Mnemonic

    1995 Williams DMD Design by George Gomez. 2 Flippers, 2 Ramps, Glove.

    300

    1975 Gottlieb EM Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 2 Standup targets Mechanical backbox animation.

    Space Shuttle

    1980 Williams Solid State Design by Barry Oursler/Joe Kaminkow. 2 Flippers, 4 Pop bumpers, 1 Ramp, 2 or 3 Ball multiball.

    High Speed

    1986 Williams Solid State Design by Steve Ritchie. 3 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 1 Ramp, 5 3-Bank standup targets.

    The Getaway: High Speed II

    1992 Williams DMD Design by Steve Ritchie. 3 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 5 3-Bank standup targets, 2 Ramps, Supercharger.

    The Bally Game Show

    1990 Bally Solid State Design by Dan Langlois/Peter Perry. 2 Flippers, 2 Ramps, 2 Ball Multiball.

    Hot Line

    1966 Williams EM Design by Steve Kordek. 2 Flippers, 5 Pop bumpers, 17 Rollover buttons.

    The Simpsons Pinball Party

    2003 Stern DMD designed by Keith P. Johnson, Joe Balcer. 5 Flippers, 4 Ramps, 3 Drop targets, 2 Cooling Towers, 1 Couch. Custom recorded call outs from TV cast.

    Lost World

    1977 Bally Solid State Design by Gary Gayton Art by Paul Faris. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 2 Saucers, Spinner.

    Sorcerer

    1985 Williams Solid State Design by Mark Ritchie. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 1 Ramp, 2 Ball Multiball. Epic Beard.

    Count-Down

    1979 Gottlieb Solid State Design by Ed Krynskil. 4 Flippers, 1 Pop bumpers, 4 x 4 Bank Drop targets.

    Terminator 2: Judgment Day

    1991 Williams DMD Design by Steve Ritchie. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 2 Ramps. Get out!

    Argosy

    1977 Williams EM Design by Chris Otis. 2 Flippers, 1 Spinner, 2 Pop bumpers, 1 Saucer, 2 Rollover buttons.

    Genie

    1977 Gottlieb Solid State Design by Ed Krynski. 5 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 11 Drop targets.

    Jacks Open

    1977 Gottlieb EM Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 9 Drop targets, No slingshots.

    Apollo

    1967 Williams EM Design by Norm Clark. 2 Flippers, 4 Pop bumpers, 7 Standup targets.

    Flight 2000

    1980 Stern Electronics Solid State Design by Harry Williams. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 5 Drop Targets, 3 Ball Multiball.

    Target Alpha

    1976 Gottlieb EM Design by Ed Krynski. 4 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 15 Drop targets, 2 slingshots.

    Airborne

    1996 Capcom Solid State Design by Claude Fernandez. 2 Flippers, many ramps.

    Hot Shot

    1973 Gottlieb Solid State Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 1 Pop bumpers, 14 Drop targets, Saucer.

    2001

    1971 Gottlieb Solid State Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 20 Drop targets.

    Fun Land

    1971 Gottlieb Solid State Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 2 Spinners.

    Major League

    1963 Williams EM. 1 Bat flippers, 7 Hanging targets, 1 Ramp.

    PREVIOUS TITLES

    You missed your chance to play these games at The Club

    The Hobbit (Smaug)

    2016 Jersey Jack Widebody with 27-inch HD LCD monitor in backbox and Small LCD in upper right playfield Software by Keith P. Johnson/Ted Estes. 3 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 11 Independent Drop Targets.

    Robocop

    1989 Data East Solid State Design by Joe Kaminkow/Ed Cebula. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, Jumpramp, Spinner, 3 Ball multiball.

    Time Warp

    1979 Williams EM Design by Barry Oursler. 2 Banana Flippers, 5 Pop bumpers, Banana Flippers.

    Flash Gordon

    1979 Bally Solid State Design by Claude Fernandez. 3 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 3 In-line targets, 2-way Kick-out hole.

    Ice Fever

    1985 Gottlieb Solid State Design by John Trudeau. 2 Flippers, 4 Pop bumpers, Captive Ball behind 3-Bank Drop Targets, Goal Light Topper.

    Star Trek

    1991 Data East Solid State Design by Joe Kaminkow/Ed Cebula. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, Swinging Target, 3 Ball multiball.

    X-Men Wolverine LE

    2012 Stern DMD designed by John Borg. 3 Flippers, 2 Ramps, 3 Pop bumpers, Wolverine Bash Toy Figurine.

    Roy Clark "The Entertainer"

    1977 Fascination Solid State Cocktail Table. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 4 Drop targets, 3 Stand up targets.

    Swords of Fury

    1988 Williams Solid State Design by Steve Kirk, Tony Kraemer, Concept by Doug Watson. 4 Flippers, No Pop bumpers, Mini-playfield, 5-bank drop targets, Lionman!

    Baywatch

    1995 Sega DMD Design by Joe Kaminkow and Joe Balcer. 3 Flippers, 1 Shark Flipper, 3 Ramps, 3 Drop Targets, 5 Ball Multiball, David Hasselhoff

    WHO dunnit

    1995 Williams DMD Design by Dwight Sullivan/Barry Oursler. 2 Flippers, 2 Ramps.

    The Lost World Jurassic Park

    1997 Sega DMD Design by John Borg. 2 Flippers, 2 Ramps.

    Congo

    1995 Williams DMD Design by John Trudeau. 3 Flippers, 2 Ramps, 3 Pop-bumpers, Gray Gorilla Sub-playfield.

    Time Machine

    1988 Data East Solid State Design by Joe Kaminkow/Ed Cebula. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 3 Ramps, Chime box.

    Aztec

    1976 Williams EM. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 6 Standup targets, Spinner.

    Street Fighter II

    1993 Gottlieb Premier Solid State Design by Ray Tanzer, Mike Vettros, Bill Parker, Jon Norris. 5 Flippers, Three level playfield, Bash car.

    Flash

    1979 Williams Solid State Design by Steve Ritchie. 3 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 1 Spinner.

    Volley

    1976 Gottlieb EM Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 15 Drop targets (3 5-banks).

    Genesis

    1993 Gottlieb Premier Solid State Design by John Trudeau. 2 Flippers, 4 Pop bumpers, 2 Ramps, 2 Kicking targets, Vari-target.

    Evil Knievel

    1976 Bally Solid State Design by Gary Gayton. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop Bumpers, 5-Bank Drop Targets, 2 Spinners

    Strikes and Spares

    1978 Bally Solid State Design by Gary Gayton, art by Kevin O'Connor. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 1 Flipper, 10 Star Rollover Buttons. Out of Order

    Ship Ahoy

    1976 Gottlieb EM Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 2 Pop bumpers, 2 Passive bumpers, 2 Stand-up targets, Spinner.

    The Flintstones

    1994 Williams DMD Design by John Trudeau. 3 Flippers, 2 Ramps, Bowling Alley.

    Judge Dredd

    1993 Williams DMD Widebody Design by John Trudeau. 4 Flippers, 2 Ramps, 6 Ball Multiball.

    Firepower

    1980 Williams Solid State Design by Steve Ritchie. 2 Flippers, 4 Pop bumpers, 10 Standup targets, 3 Ball Multiball.

    Total Nuclear Annihilation

    2017 Spooky Pinball designed by Scott Danesi. 3 Flippers, 1 Pop bumper, 11 Standup targets, 3 In-line Drop targets. Music by Scott Danesi.

    Cleopatra

    1977 Gottlieb Solid State Design by Ed Krynski. 2 Flippers, 3 Pop bumpers, 5 Drop targets, 2 Saucers.

    F-14 Tomcat

    1987 Williams Solid State Design by Steve Ritchie. 4 Flippers, 1 Pop bumper, 4 Ball Multiball, Jagov kicker.

    Old Chicago

    1976 Bally EM Design by Greg Kmiec. 2 Flippers, 5 Pop bumpers, 5 Standup targets, 5 Drop targets, Spinner.
